processing.text: if @@admin = 0 and @type = '1' begin if @@sysDatabaseName.dbo.MaxvOnline$System$GetAuthorize(@@admin, @@userID, 'COgthspb', 'Edit') = 0 select @type = '0' end declare @message nvarchar(4000), @q nvarchar(4000), @fields nvarchar(4000), @duplicate nvarchar(4000), @irregular nvarchar(4000), @field varchar(32), @irregularChars varchar(128), @r int select @irregularChars = &IrregularValue; select @duplicate = case @@language when 'v' then N'Giá trị tại ô %invalidCell đã có.' else 'The value of cell %invalidCell is invalid or already exists.' end if @type = '0' delete @@table where rtrim(ltrim(str(nam))) + rtrim(ltrim(str(ky))) + rtrim(ltrim(ma_yt)) + rtrim(ltrim(ma_sp)) + rtrim(ltrim(ma_bp)) + rtrim(ltrim(so_lsx)) + rtrim(ltrim(ma_bp0))+rtrim(ltrim(ma_vt)) in (select rtrim(ltrim(str(nam))) + rtrim(ltrim(str(ky))) + rtrim(ltrim(ma_yt)) + rtrim(ltrim(ma_sp)) + rtrim(ltrim(ma_bp)) + rtrim(ltrim(so_lsx)) + rtrim(ltrim(ma_bp0))+rtrim(ltrim(ma_vt)) from xcthspb) select @field = 'ma_yt', @r = min(stt) from @@table where ma_yt <> '' and ma_yt not in (select ma_yt from xdmyt)&Error; select @field = 'ma_sp', @r = min(stt) from @@table where ma_sp <> '' and ma_sp not in (select ma_vt from vdmsp)&Error; select @field = 'ma_bp', @r = min(stt) from @@table where ma_bp <> '' and ma_bp not in (select ma_bp from dmbp)&Error; select @field = 'ma_bp0', @r = min(stt) from @@table where ma_bp0 <> '' and ma_bp0 not in (select ma_bp from dmbp)&Error; select @field = 'ma_vt', @r = min(stt) from @@table where ma_vt <> '' and ma_vt not in (select ma_vt from dmvt)&Error; select @field = 'so_lsx', @r = min(stt) from @@table where so_lsx <> '' and rtrim(ltrim(so_lsx)) not in (select rtrim(ltrim(so_lsx)) from phsx)&Error; -- Insert select @q = 'insert into xcthspb(ky, nam,ma_yt, ma_sp, ma_bp, so_lsx, ma_vt, ma_bp0, he_so, status, datetime0, datetime2)' select @q = @q + 'select ky, nam, ma_yt, ma_sp, ma_bp, so_lsx, ma_vt, ma_bp0, he_so, '''', getdate(), getdate() from @@table' exec sp_executesql @q if @type = '1' begin update xcthspb set he_so = b.he_so from xcthspb a left join @@table b ON a.ky = b.ky and a.nam = b.nam and a.ma_yt = b.ma_yt and a.ma_sp = b.ma_sp and a.ma_bp = b.ma_bp and rtrim(ltrim(a.so_lsx)) = rtrim(ltrim(b.so_lsx)) and a.ma_vt = b.ma_vt and a.ma_bp0 = b.ma_bp0 where str(a.nam) + str(a.ky) + a.ma_yt + a.ma_sp + a.ma_bp + rtrim(ltrim(a.so_lsx)) + a.ma_bp0+a.ma_vt in (select str(nam) + str(ky) + ma_yt + ma_sp + ma_bp + rtrim(ltrim(so_lsx)) + ma_bp0+ma_vt from @@table) end
